name: klaviyo-customer-scoring
description: Free customer scoring audit for any Klaviyo account. Scores every customer 1-5 on Recency, Frequency, and Monetary value; bins them into eight actionable RFM segments (Champions, Loyal, At Risk, Can't Lose Them, Hibernating, Lost, New, Potential Loyalists); and delivers a self-contained HTML report with a revenue-concentration Pareto, a Lorenz curve, a segment table, and a sized direct-mail opportunity. Opens in any browser with zero dependencies (Save as PDF if you want a PDF). Read-only. Runs as a bundled local Python script driven by a Klaviyo read-only private API key (portable across accounts; first run walks you through key setup); completes large accounts in minutes. Recency comes from the Placed Order event stream; Monetary and frequency from profile predictive analytics.
